characters.name: Gull
characters.description: Gull is one of the main characters and a naive but loving seagull. He is voiced by Lee Tockar. His name "Gull" comes from the fact he is a seagull. In the show's opening he speaks third in order by saying "I love you guys!".

characters.name: Gull

characters.name: Merl
characters.description: Merl is one of the main characters and a safety-conscious squirrel. He is voiced by Sam Vincent who performs his voice in a Spanish accent. This squirrel is quite safety-conscious and overreacts when he finds a disaster waiting to happen. In the show's opening he speaks second in order by saying "That isn't very wise!".

characters.name: Pickle
characters.description: Early artwork for Pickle Pickleis one of the main characters and a yellow tomboy adrenaline-junkie bunny rabbit. She is voiced by Tabitha St. Germain. In the show's opening she speaks first in order by saying "Let's go on an adventure!".

characters.name: Shlitzy
characters.description: Shlitzy(sometimes spelt Schlitzy) is an evil villain who appears inMy Best Friend Shlitzy, after he takes control of his ownerGulland tries to destroy the stump. He is depicted as a half-eaten, half-rotten talking corn cob whom Gull treats in the way of a puppet, as if he were alive. He meets his fate when he is tied to some balloons byMerlandPickleand floats away through the open skylight. However, the corn-cob is afloat for a brief moment until he collides with a passing jumbo jet and falls back onto the skylight of the stump, declaring his revenge. While Gull is searching on a planet where the U.S.S. Stumpterprise has landed, he finds him. Then, Shlitzy takes once again control of Gull and he threatens Merl and Pickle, to blow the whole spacecraft.
